_README: Copy to index/index-config.json and fill in. Defines what THE PROJECT indexes — roots + file extensions — for the per-file detail (Format A). Typically filled in when the framework is installed: the extensions depend on the project's language, the framework doesn't assume them. Checked in READ mode by checks/index-check.py; edited in WRITE mode by index/manifest.py (set/rm/get/stamp).
_hub: Optional — path to a file (e.g. 'index/INDEX.md') carrying a '> Last updated: ...' line that `manifest.py stamp` will maintain (date + short commit). null = stamp disabled, no-op.
_eval-groups: Optional — array of manifest path prefixes (e.g. ['src/combat/', 'src/ui/']) that checks/index-eval/prefilter.py evaluates as groups. null/absent = groups derive from the manifest's own first-level directories.
